channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年07月03日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: [未译] World Cup boom falters as US hospitality jobs fall in June
item.description: There had been early signs of a jobs boom from the tournament, but hospitality jobs declined in June.

item.title: [未译] Bomb blast at Damascus cafe kills six, Syrian state media say
item.description: There was no immediate claim for the bombing at a cafe close to the Palace of Justice, a major government building.

item.title: [未译] 'We give up to £400': How much should you gift at a wedding?
item.description: Wedding lists are being replaced by cash requests, but guests are divided over how much to give.

item.title: [未译] South Africa and Ghana in diplomatic row over alleged killing of migrant
item.description: South Africa denies claims that a Ghanaian citizen was killed in anti-migrant protests in Cape Town.

item.title: [未译] Ebola treatments trial begins in the Democratic Republic of Congo
item.description: According to WHO data, there have been 1,406 confirmed cases of the disease in DRC, with 301 suspected cases and 438 deaths.

item.title: [未译] Oil Steadies as More Supply Flows Through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Oil steadied as tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz increased further, adding to a gush of near-term supply while talks between the US and Iran continue.

item.title: [未译] 'Most massive' Russian attack on Kyiv kills at least 27
item.description: The latest barrage deployed the largest number of weapons on the capital and hit locations over a wide area.

item.title: [未译] Why California’s carbon manure math doesn’t add up
item.description: Something stinks in California’s climate policies. Years ago, the state set up a system that pays cattle farmers across the country to turn the methane emitted from cattle manure into natural gas, enc

item.title: [未译] Artificial adventures
item.description: <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/khdiby/artificial_adventures">Comments</a></p>

item.title: [未译] Former Olympian indicted for allegedly vandalising Washington Reflecting Pool
item.description: US authorities charged him with property destruction after renovations championed by President Donald Trump appeared to go awry.

item.title: [未译] Car finance compensation payments delayed until next year
item.description: Millions could be entitled to compensation as a result of commission arrangements between lenders and dealers.

item.title: [未译] Venezuela quake survivor pulled out alive after eight days
item.description: Hernán Gil was trapped under a collapsed multi-storey car park, and encouraged them as they inched closer to him.

item.title: [未译] United States says it will not renew the USMCA, the landmark trade pact with Mexico and Canada
item.description: The agreement will now be reviewed annually, adding uncertainty to trade relations among the three countries

item.title: [未译] Japan’s Convertible Bonds Regain Favor as Rates Continue to Rise
item.description: Japanese companies have sold the highest amount of convertible bonds in more than two decades in the first half, turning to the cheaper financing alternative as interest rates continue to climb.

item.title: [未译] AI is 'not smart' so what's next in artificial intelligence?
item.description: Leading AI researcher Yan LeCun has a start-up which is developing a more flexible AI system.

item.title: [未译] Consumers Going to Feel 'Less Flush with Cash': Cisar
item.description: Winnie Cisar, global head of credit strategy at CreditSights, and Matt Brill, head of North American investment grade credit at Invesco, join Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: [未译] Fourth of July Cookout Costs Rise 4% Says Stew Leonard's CEO
item.description: Stew Leonard Jr., President and CEO of Stew Leonard's grocery stores, discussed the recent 4% increase in the average cost of an Independence Day meal for 10, now $73.82. He emphasized that despite th

item.title: [未译] Warsh Using Strategic Ambiguity: Diczok
item.description: Matthew Diczok, head of cross-asset market strategy for the Chief Investment Office within Bank of America, Kelsey Berro, fixed income portfolio manager at JPMorgan Asset Management. joins Scarlet Fu

item.title: [未译] Pubs allowed to stay open until 5am for England Mexico match
item.description: The government had initially said it would not relax licensing laws further for the World Cup.

item.title: [未译] Goat and skin in millions of 'lamb' kebabs compared to horsemeat lasagne scandal
item.description: Millions are likely to have eaten "lamb" kebabs that were actually made with goat, skin and fat.

item.title: [未译] Carney Keeps North BC Tanker Ban, Signaling Alberta’s Pipeline Will Go South
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced a deal with British Columbia that keeps an oil tanker ban in place for Canada’s north coast, and commits billions of dollars in federal funding for energy, mining

item.title: [未译] Ryanair warns of 'queue chaos' from new EU border system
item.description: The airline calls on European governments to postpone the EES system until after the summer holiday period.

item.title: [未译] Teaching AI to run with the turbines
item.description: Artificial intelligence may have captured the public imagination through chatbots and image generators, but some of its most consequential use cases are unfolding far from consumer-facing tools. In in

item.title: [未译] Trump’s other businesses: From hotels and golf clubs to watches and Bibles
item.description: The president owns a vast real estate empire, with luxury residences and skyscrapers located across the world

item.title: [未译] Harvard wins the first battle against Trump, but the war is far from over: ‘Democracy is at stake’
item.description: The richest and most prestigious university in the United States fears the consequences for the coming academic year as it faces a new wave of threats from the Republican administration

item.title: [未译] Vatican excommunicates followers of global Catholic sect
item.description: Around 600,000 followers of the Society of Saint Pius X, a Catholic sect, are affected.

item.title: [未译] Diesel sees biggest monthly fall in 26 years. What's happening to fuel prices?
item.description: When the US-Israel war with Iran began, fuel costs jumped, but they are now plummeting as hope of lasting peace grows.

item.title: [未译] Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce kick off wedding celebrations: ‘she is our queen’
item.description: The first act of pop sensation Taylor Swift’s wedding to NFL star Travis Kelce kicked off Thursday, with a rehearsal dinner for 100 guests ahead of a star-studded extravaganza at the famed Madison Squ

item.title: [未译] Meta has a new app called Pocket that is absolutely nothing like the old Pocket
item.description: Mozilla shut down the well-loved read-it-later Pocket app last year, and now Meta is launching an app called Pocket with an entirely different, AI-focused pitch: this new

item.title: [未译] Achieving operational excellence with AI
item.description: Frameworks like Lean Six Sigma and business process management (BPM) first gained traction because they promised clarity in the chaos—a structured way to bring order to messy, sprawling operations. Le
